From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

United States federal official involved in historic preservation

The **Keeper of the Register** (more formally known as the **Keeper of the National Register of Historic Places**) is a [National Park Service](/wiki/National_Park_Service "National Park Service") (NPS) official, responsible for deciding on the eligibility of historic properties for inclusion on the [U.S.](/wiki/United_States "United States") [National Register of Historic Places](/wiki/National_Register_of_Historic_Places "National Register of Historic Places") (NRHP).[[1]](#cite_note-juneau-1)[[2]](#cite_note-fedreg36-2)

The Keeper of the Register role was created following the 1966 enactment of the [National Historic Preservation Act (NHPA)](/wiki/National_Historic_Preservation_Act "National Historic Preservation Act"). The NHPA declared a national policy focus on preserving significant historic sites, and it has been amended several times since it was first enacted. The NHPA authorized the [Secretary of the Interior](/wiki/Secretary_of_the_Interior_and_Local_Government "Secretary of the Interior and Local Government") to maintain a [National Register of Historic Places](/wiki/National_Register_of_Historic_Places "National Register of Historic Places"), which has been delegated to the Keeper by the Director of the [National Park Service](/wiki/National_Park_Service "National Park Service").[[3]](#cite_note-3)

The first person to hold the office was [William J. Murtagh](/wiki/William_J._Murtagh "William J. Murtagh"), whose term ran from 1967 through 1979. The Keeper's authority may be delegated as they see fit.[[2]](#cite_note-fedreg36-2) The [State Historic Preservation Officer](/wiki/State_historic_preservation_office "State historic preservation office") for each [state](/wiki/U.S._state "U.S. state") submits nominations to the Keeper. Upon receipt, the Keeper has 45 days to decide whether to add the property to the NRHP.[[2]](#cite_note-fedreg36-2)[[4]](#cite_note-archnet-4)[[5]](#cite_note-oklahist-5)

The Keeper of the Register role is supported by several regional reviewers, who review submissions for inclusion on the NHRP.[[6]](#cite_note-:0-6) This team also is supported by several archaeologists, archivists, and historians.[[6]](#cite_note-:0-6)

| Acting[[8]](#cite_note-8) | Carol D. Shull | 1979 – 1981 | [William J. Whalen III](/wiki/William_J._Whalen_III "William J. Whalen III") |  |
| 2 | Jerry L. Rogers | 1981 – 1994 | [Russell E. Dickenson](/wiki/Russell_E._Dickenson "Russell E. Dickenson") |  |

| 4 | Jan Snyder Matthews | 2005 – 2009 | [Fran P. Mainella](/wiki/Fran_P._Mainella "Fran P. Mainella") |  |

| 6 | J. Paul Loether | June 3, 2017 – June 25, 2018 | [Michael T. Reynolds](/wiki/Michael_T._Reynolds "Michael T. Reynolds") |  |
